macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Raw response
items.summary:
The most significant macroeconomic and stock market developments from the past 24 hours include **US Non-Farm Payrolls surging to +312K** (far exceeding the +185K forecast), **oil prices extending gains** due to supply concerns, and **Honda announcing a hold on its electric vehicle factory plans in Canada**.

### **Major Index Movements**
*   **US Futures:** Edge higher in early trading as investors await inflation data and fresh Fed commentary, though **S&P futures** later dipped **-0.4%** and

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Rallies to $64,000 After Trump Signals Bullish Stance on Crypto
items.summary: Bitcoin surged to $64,000 following President Trump's announcement that Bitcoin may be added to 'Trump Accounts,' despite a brief dip caused by Michael Saylor's Strategy selling approximately 3,588 BTC to fund dividends.

items.title: Ripple Secures Full MiCA CASP License for Europe
items.summary: Ripple achieved a major regulatory victory by receiving its full MiCA CASP license, enabling it to expand regulated crypto services across all 30 EEA countries.

items.title: US Clarity Act Deadline Extended to August 7 Amid Senate Recess
items.summary: The deadline for the Crypto Clarity Act to pass has been set for August 7, just before the Senate leaves for summer recess, with negotiations ongoing and participants remaining optimistic about passage this year.

items.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine Purchases $74M in Ethereum to Reach 5% Holdings
items.summary: Bitmine Immersion Technologies bought another $74 million in Ethereum, advancing chairman Tom Lee's strategic goal of holding 5% of the total crypto asset supply.

items.title: MX1 Global Raises $5.5M Seed Round Led by Paradigm for Tokenized Sovereign Debt
items.summary: MX1 Global secured a $5.5 million seed round led by Paradigm to expand its USDM1 tokenized sovereign debt platform and use it as collateral across regulated financial markets.

items.title: Solana Ranks #2 in Global Spot Crypto Trading Volume for Second Week
items.summary: Solana posted $12.25 billion in weekly trading volume across decentralized and centralized exchanges, ranking second globally and trailing only Binance.

items.title: Ethereum Faces New 3-4 Year Roadmap with Potential W-Pattern Breakout
items.summary: Ethereum has unveiled a new 3-4 year roadmap, with technical analysts noting a potential W-pattern forming near the 50-day EMA at $1,800, signaling a possible breakout confirmation.

items.title: Bitcoin ETF Inflows Turn Positive with $200M Surge
items.summary: Bitcoin ETF inflows flipped from negative to positive, recording $200 million in inflows for the first time in a long period, coinciding with broader market enthusiasm.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: AMD Launches Ryzen AI Halo: A $4,000 Developer Machine Competing with NVIDIA's Tiny AI Box
items.summary: AMD has released the Ryzen AI Halo, a $4,000 developer machine that outperforms NVIDIA's Spark in token generation across multiple models, including GLM Flash 30B (14% faster) and Quen 3.51 122B (12% faster), while also delivering image generation speeds up to seven times faster than Apple M4 Pro.

items.title: PyTorch Emerges as Default Framework for AI Engineering and Research Roles in 2026
items.summary: PyTorch has solidified its position as the leading framework for research and AI engineering, with Hugging Face providing access to nearly all relevant open models, marking a shift in industry standards for machine learning development.

items.title: Intent-Driven Development Shifts AI Workflow with Claude Code and Fable 5 Model
items.summary: A radical shift toward intent-driven development is underway, where users instruct AI on what to build rather than how, powered by the new Fable 5 model and Dynamic Workflows feature that spawns parallel engineering subagents for real-time UI, audio, and haptics generation.

items.title: Chrome Extension Enables Hand-Drawing on Video Calls Using Only Gesture Recognition
items.summary: A new Chrome extension allows users to draw, point, and circle on video calls using only hand gestures, introducing a superpower for remote collaboration without requiring physical input devices.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX 1+2 Dual Collection and Pel World 1.0 Launch This Week
items.summary: Notable indie and major releases include the Gunvolt Chronicles dual bundle and the official 1.0 final release of the open-world survival hit Pel World, which previously launched in early access amid controversy.

items.title: Forest Escape: Last Train and Moonlight Peaks Announced as Key Indie Releases
items.summary: New indie titles include the co-op horror game Forest Escape: Last Train and Moonlight Peaks, a supernatural life sim where players settle as a vampire in a magical town of werewolves and witches.

items.title: President Trump Intervenes in FIFA World Cup 2026 Over USA Striker Balogun's Red Card
items.summary: President Donald Trump credited himself for persuading FIFA to overturn a mandatory one-game ban for USA star Folarin Balogun after a controversial red card, allowing him to play in the Round of 16 against Belgium.

items.title: FIFA Suspends Balogun's Ban Ahead of USA vs. Belgium Match
items.summary: FIFA officially suspended Folarin Balogun's red card ban, enabling the USA striker to participate in the World Cup Round of 16 match against Belgium in Seattle.

items.title: Smite 2 Esports Guide Released for 2026 Competitive Play
items.summary: A new YouTube guide titled 'HOW TO GET GOOD AT SMITE 2 IN 2026' offers strategies, build recommendations, and tier list insights for players aiming to improve in Smite 2 esports.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: TeraWulf Announces Major Power Deal with Anthropic, Highlighting Critical Data Center Demand
items.summary: TeraWulf CEO Paul Prager discussed a significant new deal with Anthropic, emphasizing that the demand for power in data centers is 'very significant' and represents the 'tip of the iceberg' for the tech industry's infrastructure needs.

items.title: Abbott Launches New Dual Glucose-Ketone Sensor for Diabetes Management
items.summary: Abbott has introduced a commercially available dual glucose-ketone sensor (Libre Duo) that received CE marking in Europe, offering a new way for people with type 1 and type 2 diabetes to monitor ketones alongside glucose.

items.title: Omnipod 5 Integration with Eversense 365 CGM Enables Year-Long Automated Insulin Delivery
items.summary: A major product integration was announced between the Omnipod 5 insulin pump and the Eversense 365 CGM, which is the only continuous glucose monitor lasting a full year, creating the first system to automate insulin with on-body vibration alerts.

items.title: Krispy Kreme's Tech-Driven Turnaround Plan Hits Automation Limits
items.summary: Krispy Kreme is facing challenges with its technology-driven turnaround strategy as the company encounters the 'limits of automation,' signaling a potential shift in how the food industry implements tech solutions.
